parameters.query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS gda_idiq_tracker (id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, contract_number TEXT UNIQUE NOT NULL, idiq_name TEXT NOT NULL, agency TEXT, issuing_office TEXT, naics_codes TEXT[], contract_ceiling NUMERIC DEFAULT 0, period_of_performance_start DATE, period_of_performance_end DATE, gda_position TEXT DEFAULT 'targeting', gda_prime_or_sub TEXT DEFAULT 'prime', vehicle_type TEXT DEFAULT 'IDIQ', set_aside TEXT, total_tos_issued INTEGER DEFAULT 0, total_to_value NUMERIC DEFAULT 0, last_to_date DATE, on_ramp_status TEXT DEFAULT 'none', on_ramp_deadline DATE, competitors TEXT[], incumbent_primes TEXT[], sam_search_keywords TEXT[], notes TEXT, source_url TEXT, last_checked TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW(), created_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW(), updated_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW());
SELECT * FROM gda_idiq_tracker WHERE gda_position IN ('holder','teaming','targeting')

parameters.name: postedFrom
parameters.value: ={{ (() => { const d = new Date(Date.now() - 30*24*60*60*1000); return (d.getMonth()+1).toString().padStart(2,'0') + '/' + d.getDate().toString().padStart(2,'0') + '/' + d.getFullYear(); })() }}

parameters.name: postedTo
parameters.value: ={{ (() => { const d = new Date(); return (d.getMonth()+1).toString().padStart(2,'0') + '/' + d.getDate().toString().padStart(2,'0') + '/' + d.getFullYear(); })() }}

parameters.query: INSERT INTO gda_opportunity_tracker (solicitation_number, opp_title, agency, dept, naics_code, set_aside, response_deadline, source_url, data_source, govtribe_id, gda_score, gda_label, eis_fit_score, stage, ai_analysis, last_refreshed) VALUES ('{{ $json.solicitation_number }}', '{{ ($json.opp_title || '').replace(/'/g, "''").substring(0,500) }}', '{{ ($json.agency || '').replace(/'/g, "''") }}', '{{ ($json.dept || '').replace(/'/g, "''") }}', '{{ $json.naics_code || '' }}', '{{ ($json.set_aside || '').replace(/'/g, "''") }}', {{ $json.response_deadline ? "'" + $json.response_deadline + "'" : 'NULL' }}, '{{ $json.source_url || '' }}', 'IDIQ TO Monitor', '{{ $json.govtribe_id || '' }}', {{ $json.gda_score || 50 }}, '{{ $json.gda_label || 'EVALUATE' }}', {{ $json.eis_fit_score || 50 }}, 'Identified', '{{ ($json.ai_analysis || '').replace(/'/g, "''") }}', NOW()) ON CONFLICT (solicitation_number) DO UPDATE SET gda_score = GREATEST(EXCLUDED.gda_score, gda_opportunity_tracker.gda_score), ai_analysis = EXCLUDED.ai_analysis, last_refreshed = NOW()
